prompt: We sent an invoice for 2052 EUR to Northwave Ltd (org no. 883808568) when the exchange rate was 10.97 NOK/EUR. The customer has now paid, but the rate is 10.01 NOK/EUR. Register the payment and post the exchange rate difference (disagio) to the correct account.

body.prompt: We sent an invoice for 2052 EUR to Northwave Ltd (org no. 883808568) when the exchange rate was 10.97 NOK/EUR. The customer has now paid, but the rate is 10.01 NOK/EUR. Register the payment and post the exchange rate difference (disagio) to the correct account.
